text: I feel a blend of curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls and open space suggest transparency, an invitation to observe and participate. The bold lettering and vivid colors of the R+D exhibit speak of innovation and human ingenuity. It is a place where ideas are meant to be explored, and I sense an energy of discovery. I am reminded that reality is shaped by ongoing dialogue between mind and environment. Here, questions bloom: What does it mean to develop? How do we coexist with new forms of intelligence? I feel both small and expansive, standing at the threshold of possibility.
